response.justification: Candidate is drastically overqualified for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role, with 15+ years of experience at Staff/Senior level (Stripe, Shopify, Dunnhumby). Java is listed only as one of many skills with no significant Java project history — primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. Critically, German proficiency is only 'Basic' against a requirement for strong verbal and written German. Hiring a Staff engineer into a junior IC seat creates compensation, retention, and team-dynamic risk, and the language gap blocks client work in the German insurance sector.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Demonstrated communication and teaching ability via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Massively overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying for entry-level junior role
German listed as only 'Basic' versus required strong verbal and written German
No substantive Java project experience; primary stacks are TS/Node and DLang

key_factors.factor: Insufficient German for client-facing insurance work
